evidence: MCP as an open-source protocol for AI to take action. He highlighted the major shift from text-only results to interactive UI components (MCP Apps) recently announced by OpenAI and Anthropic.
ChatGPT just opened its App Store to third-party submissions that morning, featuring about 20 initial apps (lifestyle, B2B, B2C like TurboTax/Credit Karma).
The Alpic platform simplifies deployment and management of MCP servers and ChatGPT apps, with Vercel-like one-click deployment from GitHub, live testing, logs, and analytics.
Idea of using Zo as a backend for a ChatGPT app, with Alpic as the middle layer. Potential to introduce Alpic to Zo community for synergy.
Networking use case for Zo: blend Gmail and LinkedIn data to manage social graph and intelligent cadences (e.g., mentor check-ins every 3 months).
Partnerships with Next Play (~1k members, $12/mo) and AI Collective (~80-90k members) for virtual/IRL events hosted on/with Zo.
